title: Emerald Equipment
description: Adds emerald tools, weapons, and armor to Minecraft
body:
# 💚 Emerald Equipment ⛏️ Expand your Minecraft arsenal with a complete emerald equipment tier! This datapack and resource pack combo adds craftable emerald tools, weapons, and armor that fill the gap between iron and diamond gear. ![Fantaz and his nautilus wearing emerald gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T3vt10wr/images/13bd509d5ad2f69254007a5aeb93dd8d165c0d60.png) --- ## ✨ Features ### 🛠️ Complete Equipment Set Craft a full set of emerald equipment using emeralds you've gathered from mining or trading:
Available Items - **Tools**: Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe - **Weapons**: Spear, Sword - **Armor**: Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots - **Mounts Armor**: Nautilus Armor, Horse Armor *All items feature custom textures and full armor trim support!*
--- ### ⚖️ Balanced Mid-Tier Stats Emerald equipment sits comfortably between iron and diamond, offering a meaningful upgrade without overshadowing end-game gear: | Stat | Value | |------|-------| | **Tools/Weapon Durability** | 960 | | **Armor Protection** | 19 Armor, 1 Armor Toughness | | **Horse Armor** | 8 Armor, 1 Armor Toughness | | **Nautilus Armor** | 7 Armor, 1 Armor Toughness | | **Enchantability** | 12 | --- ### ⚔️ Custom Tool Stats Each tool and weapon has been carefully balanced to feel distinct and useful. --- ### 🎨 Full Armor Trim Support All armor pieces support vanilla armor trims! --- ## 🔧 Installation **For Datapack + Resource Pack:** 1. Download both the **Datapack** and **Resource Pack** files 2. Place the datapack ZIP in your world's `datapacks/` folder 3. Place the resource pack ZIP in your `resourcepacks/` folder and enable it in-game 4. Reload with `/reload` or restart your world **For Mod Loaders (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge/Quilt):** - Download the `.jar` file and place it in your `mods/` folder - *Requires Fabric API for Fabric/Quilt* --- ## 💎 The "Scrappy Underdog" Philosophy > Emerald equipment is designed as the **practical mid-tier choice**: durable enough to be your everyday gear, protective enough to handle most challenges, and enchantable enough to customize to your playstyle. > > *It's not as flashy as diamond, but it gets the job done and plays nice with your enchanting table.* --- ## 💜 More Equipment Tiers **Also check out:** - **[Amethyst Equipment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fantazs-amethyst-equipment)** - A companion pack adding amethyst gear to complete your mid-tier options! --- ## 🙏 Credits & Inspiration This datapack was inspired by and builds upon: - **[Emerald Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/emerald-equipment)** © exline – MIT License *Ported to datapack format with custom balance adjustments and full armor trim support.* --- ## 📝 License & Usage - *Licensed under MIT.* - *Free to use in modpacks and videos with credit.* ---
